case_title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. NICK DECAMPLI et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-20-2013 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MOHANNA, KEYHAN AS TO DEFENDANT DECAMPLI, NICK GRAHAM, AMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
